inputs.label: Beam Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the beam between supports

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of the beam between supports
businessContext_i18n.de: Länge des Trägers zwischen den Stützen
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur de la poutre entre les supports
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud de la viga entre apoyos

inputs.label: Load Distance from Left
inputs.businessContext: Distance from left support to the load application point

label_i18n.fr: Distance de la charge depuis la gauche
label_i18n.es: Distancia de la carga desde la izquierda

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance from left support to the load application point
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sol destekten yük uygulama noktasına olan mesafe
businessContext_i18n.de: Abstand von der linken Stütze zum Lastangriffspunkt
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance du support gauche au point d'application de la charge
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia desde el apoyo izquierdo hasta el punto de aplicación de la carga
businessContext_i18n.ar: المسافة من الدعامة اليسرى إلى نقطة تطبيق الحمل

inputs.label: Shear Force Location
inputs.businessContext: Distance from left support at which shear force is evaluated

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance from left support at which shear force is evaluated
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesme kuvvetinin değerlendirildiği sol destekten uzaklık
businessContext_i18n.de: Abstand von der linken Stütze, an dem die Querkraft ausgewertet wird
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance du support gauche à laquelle l'effort tranchant est évalué
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia desde el apoyo izquierdo donde se evalúa la fuerza cortante
businessContext_i18n.ar: المسافة من الدعم الأيسر التي يتم عندها تقييم قوة القص

formulas.shearForce: calculationPoint <= loadDistanceFromLeft ? (loadMagnitude * (beamLength - loadDistanceFromLeft)) / beamLength : -(loadMagnitude * loadDistanceFromLeft) / beamLength

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
